0 I 3
1 I 4
2 I 5

5 C 5n
6 C 6n
7 C 7n

Applying to 00110011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 0
3 I 6 = 1
4 I 7 = 1
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 C 7n = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{10011000}
